allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) def show_structure\(d, indent=0\): for k, v in d.items\(\): if isinstance\(v, dict\) and 'value' not in v: print\(' ' * indent + k + '/'\) show_structure\(v, indent + 2\) elif isinstance\(v, dict\) and 'value' in v: print\(' ' * indent + k + f' = {v[\\"value\\"]}'\) show_structure\(data\) ")

Bash(node -e " const data = require\('./packages/tokens/src/tokens-studio.json'\); function show\(d, indent=0\) { for \(const [k, v] of Object.entries\(d\)\) { if \(v && typeof v === 'object' && !Array.isArray\(v\)\) { if \('value' in v\) { console.log\(' '.repeat\(indent\) + k + ' = ' + v.value\); } else { console.log\(' '.repeat\(indent\) + k + '/'\); show\(v, indent + 2\); } } } } show\(data\); ")

Bash(node -e "var key='Grey Opacity 800'; var parent='Grey Opacity'; var escaped=parent.replace\(/[.*+?^\\${}\(\)|[\\]\\\\\\\\]/g,'\\\\\\\\$&'\); var stripped=key.replace\(new RegExp\('^'+escaped+'\\\\\\\\s+'\),''\); console.log\(stripped\);")
